subcodes.first_line: God calleth from the precincts of the Prison unto His chosen servants, and summoneth them unto the station wherefrom light hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینادی الله من شطر السجن عباده الاخیار و یدعوهم الی مقام الذی منه استضائت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @proclamation to the people of the world, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
